channel.name: PAS IN

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
LOCAL-1-0 <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/> M F U
GBGB HOME
--- . Next of Kin
GB HOME
Optometrist
GB CORR
10 G9999981 >

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
DoctorCode
VisitStatusXML
PartialRecord
NHSNumber
GenerateSecondaryHospitalNumber
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PatientXML
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
LOCAL-1-1 <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/> M F U
GBGB HOME
--- . Next of Kin
GB HOME
Optometrist
GB CORR
10 G9999981 >

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
DoctorCode
VisitStatusXML
PartialRecord
NHSNumber
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['MSH']['MSH.9']['MSH.9.2'].toString()" does not equal "M05"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Appointment Filter

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
